creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text: And the cleanup is only necessary because manu@ made a style mistake (let's ignore variable order which was also wrong) a year ago using his fork in PATCH_SITES instead of upstream which now conflicts with the fix here as it needs different fork. GitLab unlike GitHub only allows referencing hashes from forks when part of a merge-request. For example, https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/manu/drm/-/commit/9ef84bbc6269 doesn't exist because it wasn't submitted to manu's fork but rather to its upstream.
